entries.femaleVariant: You made it. Good. Keep your voice down.
entries.maleVariant: You made it. Good. Keep your voice down.

entries.femaleVariant: Ghostline. Heard the name float around. Never saw the ghosts.
entries.maleVariant: Ghostline. Heard the name float around. Never saw the ghosts.

entries.femaleVariant: That's the point. We're not a gang, not a brand. We listen, collect, move things nobody wants traced.
entries.maleVariant: That's the point. We're not a gang, not a brand. We listen, collect, move things nobody wants traced.

entries.femaleVariant: Plenty of mercs in Night City. Why pull me in?
entries.maleVariant: Plenty of mercs in Night City. Why pull me in?

entries.femaleVariant: Because you get in, get out, and don't start asking the wrong questions before the eddies clear.
entries.maleVariant: Because you get in, get out, and don't start asking the wrong questions before the eddies clear.

entries.femaleVariant: Alright. Talk. What am I doing?
entries.maleVariant: Alright. Talk. What am I doing?

entries.femaleVariant: Tyger Claws are sitting on a relay that looks dead from the street. It isn't. Someone's laundering data through it.
entries.maleVariant: Tyger Claws are sitting on a relay that looks dead from the street. It isn't. Someone's laundering data through it.

entries.femaleVariant: You jack the node, pull the cache, and drop it where we tell you. Clean job, if nobody gets curious.
entries.maleVariant: You jack the node, pull the cache, and drop it where we tell you. Clean job, if nobody gets curious.

entries.femaleVariant: Tyger Claws don't move like that for free. Who's behind it?
entries.maleVariant: Tyger Claws don't move like that for free. Who's behind it?

entries.femaleVariant: Someone Arasaka-adjacent. That's all you need. You want names, ask after the job's done.
entries.maleVariant: Someone Arasaka-adjacent. That's all you need. You want names, ask after the job's done.

entries.femaleVariant: Fine. Send me the coordinates. I'll get your data.
entries.maleVariant: Fine. Send me the coordinates. I'll get your data.

entries.femaleVariant: Knew you would. Location's already queued.
entries.maleVariant: Knew you would. Location's already queued.

entries.femaleVariant: Pull the cache, use the drop point, and don't improvise unless you have to.
entries.maleVariant: Pull the cache, use the drop point, and don't improvise unless you have to.
